creators.affiliation: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center, Greenbelt, MD
creators.name: Spohn, Corey

title: coronagraphoto
description: coronagraphoto is an open-source Python library for simulating coronagraphic observations of exoplanetary systems. It bridges yield calculations and image generation for missions like the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) by combining high-fidelity coronagraph models loaded via yippy with planetary system simulations from ExoVista. Built on JAX, coronagraphoto is fully JIT-compilable, differentiable, and GPU-accelerated for large-scale optimization and high-performance simulation.
